calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CRAIG MARBLE'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS.

The court denies the motion to quash but orders counsel for defendant to submit to the first-look procedure. The deposition officer is directed to produce the material to plaintiff's counsel. Plaintiff's counsel will have two weeks from production to log any withheld records by provider, date, and sufficient description of the records to enable defendant to ascertain whether they relate to the condition or body part at issue. If plaintiff's counsel fails to provide the ordered log within this timeframe the deposition officer shall release subpoenaed records to defendant, who is ordered to hold them in confidence, to use them only in connection with this litigation, to disclose them only as necessary for this litigation, and not to disclose them to anyone who does not agree to be bound by these restrictions.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
